mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO photo (filename, file_path, thumbnail_url, original_url, lat, lng, altitude, shoot_time, location, width, height) VALUES
(#{p.filename}, #{p.filePath}, #{p.thumbnailUrl}, #{p.originalUrl}, #{p.lat}, #{p.lng}, #{p.altitude}, #{p.shootTime}, #{p.location}, #{p.width}, #{p.height})
mapper.select: SELECT DATEDIFF(DATE(shoot_time), '1970-01-01') AS dayid, COUNT(*) AS count, JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'fileid', id, 'dayid', DATEDIFF(DATE(shoot_time), '1970-01-01'), 'w', width, 'h', height, 'isfavorite', 0 ) ) AS detail FROM photo WHERE shoot_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE(shoot_time), DATEDIFF(DATE(shoot_time), '1970-01-01') ORDER BY DATE(shoot_time) DESC

SELECT id AS fileid, filename AS name, original_url AS url, thumbnail_url AS thumbnail_url, width AS w, height AS h, 0 AS isvideo, 0 AS isfavorite, 0 AS isfolder, DATEDIFF(DATE(shoot_time), '1970-01-01') AS datetaken FROM photo WHERE shoot_time IS NOT NULL AND DATEDIFF(DATE(shoot_time), '1970-01-01') = #{dayid} ORDER BY shoot_time ASC
